title: cyathea toroi
intro: Cyathea toroi, also known as a species of tree fern, is a plant native to the tropical forests of New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Research has shown that Cyathea toroi has various health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-cancer properties, making it a potential treatment for various diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
